calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Rodel E. Rodis
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RODEL RODIS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is GRANTED. Mr. Rodis has shown that he is entitled to have the default and default judgment entered against him on July 6, 2017 set aside per CCP 473(b) because he mistakenly believed that he had not been properly served with the summons and complaint. Granting the motion is in accord with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and plaintiff Cavalry SPVI, LLC has not identified how it would suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (L&M302)
